params.name: element
params.description: Optional element override for the button. In most cases you do not need this because the macro will render an anchor when you pass `href`, or a button when you pass `text` or `html`.

params.name: text
params.description: Plain text label for the button or link. Ignored if `html` is provided. This has no effect when `element` is set to `input`.

params.name: html
params.description: Trusted HTML label content for the button or link. When provided it replaces `text`. This has no effect when `element` is set to `input`.

params.name: name
params.description: Name for the `input` or `button`. This has no effect on `a` elements.

params.name: type
params.description: Type of `input` or `button` – `button`, `submit` or `reset`. Defaults to `submit`. This has no effect on `a` elements.

params.name: value
params.description: Value for the `button` tag. This has no effect on `a` or `input` elements.

params.name: disabled
params.description: Whether the button should be disabled. For button and input elements, `disabled` and `aria-disabled` attributes will be set automatically.

params.name: href
params.description: Navigation destination. When provided, the macro renders an anchor unless you explicitly override `element`.

params.name: classes
params.description: Extra classes added to the root element for layout or integration hooks.

params.name: attributes
params.description: Additional HTML attributes to add to the root element, for example `data-*` or `aria-*` attributes.
